tuning: E A D G B E
content:
EADGBe

The strumming's a bit tricky to get the hang of, basically:

[ch]F[/ch]//[ch]C[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]/[ch]C[/ch]/[ch]F[/ch]//[ch]C[/ch]/  Play it through a couple of times and it'll make sense...
